top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    d_year,
    d_moy,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2001
    AND d_moy = 8
GROUP BY 
    ca_state,
    d_year,
    d_moy
ORDER BY 
    ca_state,
    d_year,
    d_moy
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    ca_state,
    d_year,
    d_moy,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2001
    AND d_moy = 8
GROUP BY 
    ca_state,
    d_year,
    d_moy
ORDER BY 
    ca_state,
    d_year,
    d_moy
LIMIT 100;
